feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CPI Post Method with Odata V2 Adapter
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an iFlow with the odata v2 adapter, and the method is POST, but the issue is that when I call the url, it shows an error, but whenever I call the odata url via Postman or Gateway, it is successfully posted.

entry.title: Integrate Solman and ServiceNow using SAP CPI or PO as middleware.
entry.content:
There is a requirement to Integrate Solman with ServiceNow using a middleware. SNMP Trap is being used at the Solman side. Is it possible to use SAP CPI or PO in this scenario as middleware?
And if SNMP Trap is avoided, is there any different way to send data to middleware?

Any information will be much appreciated.
Thank You.

entry.title: Need Help to extract value from message with groovy script in CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please help me in groovy script to extract the highlighted value from below message and set it as property"DOCNUM"

 

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
<RootNode>
<Payload>
EDIXX3SSIP2000131 0000131 DELIN2.002.OD.02.S03 DELSCHD031 0000000000039067
EDIMSG
MID 1
MID 20231221
MID 0000
</Payload>
<MsgHeader>
            <EndPoint>ABCDE</EndPoint> 
            <EntryID>XXXYYY</EntryID>   
            <RetryCount>2</RetryCount>          
        </MsgHeader>
</RootNode>

 

Your help would be highly appreciated !

Thanks in advance

Jeevitha

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration Odata Adapter $metadata failed to connect to system error
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am trying to configure receiver OData adapter (OData V2), I have added content modifier before request-reply --> Odata Adapter with header values APIKey = xxxxx.

Added header in Odata adapter under Header details for request and metadata.

While trying to Model Opertaion, I am getting error "failed to connect to system".

I tried with postman and http receiver adapter and it is working fine.

How do I fix connection issue while working on OData adapter.

URL = https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/$metadata

BR,

RJ

entry.title: Restrict some IP (BTP data center IP) for Outbound Call from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello,

This is the 2nd time I have encountered the same problem where receiving party is saying that they can whitelist up-to 6 IPs only. We are having SAP Integration Suite as middle ware where some data is being send from SAP to Receiving party via API/SFTP.

I have asked the same to SAP but as per them it is not possible to restrict IPs for outbound connection. Some time receiving party adjust and whitelist all the IPs but in case of they simply denied and we don't have any solution.

 

For the solution I have come across where as per the SAP note we can minimize the IP via cloud connector but not able to find how to do that. Can someone guide on this topic.

 

reference screenshot from SAP note : 3209308 

Thanks,

Aman Sharma

entry.title: SAP BTP IS (CI) vs SAP PO Comparison
entry.content: Hello, does anyone know if there is any SAP published document out there that shows a comparison between SAP BTP IS (CI) and SAP PO? I need one for a client.

entry.title: Authorization issue with SAP DropBox Adapter
entry.content:
Hello,

I have copied the DropBox adapter provided by SAP in the content discovery, and followed the documentation.

However, when trying to authorize the OAuth2 Authorization Code from the "Monitor->Security", I receive the following error back.

[OAuthCodeCredentialManagement][OAUTH][ProblemDuringCallingTokenEndpointWithCode]:Problem during calling the token endpoint of OAuth2 Authorization Code Credential "DropBox" with grant type authorization_code: Problem during requesting the refresh token for the OAuth2 Authorization Code Credential DropBox: javax.net.ssl.SSLException: MAC values do not match

I have already tried to add the DropBox certificates chain, it doesn't help. 

Other OAuth2 credentials are working fine.

Any idea what could be the root cause ?

Thanks

entry.title: Any Online Editor Available for Groovy SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Are there any alternative online SAP CPI Groovy editors available besides https://groovyide.com/cpi? The https://groovyide.com/cpi server is currently unavailable.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Particula GL is Not picking the cost center
entry.content: While Posting MIGO entry against The PO Particular GL Cost center is not Picking could you plz any one can help me?

entry.title: SAP cpi producess error at iterative splitter
entry.content:
My integration flow processes an XML file containing multiple records. An iterative splitter separates each record for individual processing. Based on business logic, am filtering out some records, and the remaining ones are sent to the PEGA API. Finally, a gather component merges all responses, regardless of success or failure.

However, if the API returns a 400 status code (indicating an error) for any record, the splitter encounters an error. This error message appears: "error.java.lang.illegalstateexception: com.ctc.wstx.exc.WstxEOFException: Unexpected EOF in Prolog."

entry.title: substring function in CPI properties
entry.content:
Please help how to extract the highlighted value and put it in another property using substring ?

 

I am not getting required value , please let me know the sytax to be used for substring 

 

Thanks in advance

Jeevitha

entry.title: Error during oData API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

i have a problem that I could use some advice on.

I want to create an attachment on the delivery document using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet.

Via Postman, this works fine with the following header parameters:

As body i use "Binary" where i upload my pdf-File.

But when i try to build the same call in SAP Cloud Integration via an iFlow i get the following error:

"Error Details
com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Request Payload Parsing Failed for one of the reason: (1) Either the OData metadata content available in the server is outdated OR (2) The request payload seems to be incorrect. Error Details : only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not J (position: START_DOCUMENT seen J... @1:1) , org.xmlpull.v1.XmlPullParserException: only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not J (position: START_DOCUMENT seen J... @1:1)"

As body i use a pdf File which i get as a response from another webservice with Content-Type "application/pdf".

Any hints ? Do i have to convert the file before calling the oData Service.

Tried to use the BASE64 Encode Function, but getting the same error.

Thanks in Advance.

Simon

entry.title: Issue with EDI 856 to DELVRY07 IDOC mapping in CPI - IA - MAG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create the MAG with the source as EDI 856 and target as DELVRY07 IDOC but unable to complete the MAG as not getting expected results.

EDI 856 Structure   

 HL*C^      ---> For each HL*C we need to create one E1EDL20.

      HL*O^   ---> each HL*C can have multiple HL*O^ and for each HL*O need to populate E1EDL24

         HL*T^  ---> Each HL*O can have multiple HL*T and for each HL*T need to populate E1EDl37.

              HL*P & HL*I  ---> each KL*T can have multiple HL*P & HL*I

The problem here is we can't pre transform the structure in MAG as there is no identifier in the source EDI file to establish the relationship based on that we can restructure.

Could you please advise or suggest how can we proceed further now ?

entry.title: cXML Support in Trading Partner Management of SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear all,

today I would like to ask you to vote for the following customer influence request:

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

While SAP is heavily working on enhancing the B2B / Trading Partner Management solution on SAP Integration Suite there is one important B2B format still missing and not yet on the roadmap: cXML.

cXML / Commerce XML is an xml-based message protocol to exchange business documents (i.e. purchase order, order confirmation, shipping notification, invoice, etc.) between procurement applications / trading partners. A lot of e-procurement platforms (Ariba, Coupa, Jaegger, etc.) are using this standard. Therefor it would be great to have this also as a part of the B2B solution on SAP Integration Suite.

In case that you do like this improvement request and have similar requirements / pain points, please vote for this improvement to increase the chance that SAP will take this into consideration for the roadmap.

Thanks and best regards!

Christopher

entry.title: router Non-xml condition error as Invalid format of condition expression
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Cloud Integration , SAP Integration Suite,

I have stored properties in content modifier and trying to apply NON-XML condition in router to check the length.

But its giving an error as Invalid format of condition expression.

Property as below:

  1. C4C_ContactID --> value from Xpath
  2. userId --> value from Xpath
( ${property.C4C_ContactID} = null or ${property.C4C_ContactID.trim().length()} = '0' ) and ( ${property.userId} = null or ${property.userId.trim().length()} = '0' )

Kindly help me to understand what is wrong in above condition.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Suite) to SWIFT???
entry.content:
Hi All,

While i was exploring the integration possibilities from CI to SWIFT had few questions around this as below.

1. If the integration has to be from S4HANA then there is a direct connector available for SWIFT which we can start configuring from SPRO tcode without the need of CI . Is is the best approach comparing to the other available options???

2. If the connector is not available might be S4HANA release issue or for normal ECC system then that case the traditional way of generating the file in AL11 from where CI will pick the drop onto the target system with all sort of security parameters(encryption/signature) maintained. We dont have standard prepackaged content like what we had for SWIFT SWCV in PI/PO??? Also the SFTP 3.0 which was used in PI/PO for SWIFT integration with the module configurations. How it can be accompanied in CI??? Are there any technical glitches???

3. Any other mechanisms for this integrations???

Please do share your thoughts on this.

Thank You.

Regards,

Farooq

entry.title: How to Post a Json Body to an Odata Url in CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Please suggest how I post a JSON body to an odata url with a header and line item using CPI.

entry.title: JSON to XML Cloud Integration raises error "Invalid white space character"
entry.content:
JSON to XML Converter in SAP Cloud Integration raises error "Invalid white space character"
SAP Techs, 

 3068804 - JSON to XML Converter in SAP Cloud Integration raises error "Invalid white space character" - SAP for Me - explains the following error "com.ctc.wstx.exc.WstxIOException: Invalid white space character (0x11) in text to output (in xml 1.1, could output as a character entity)" can be addressed by using script or manual. 

 Help needed to address this using groovy/Java script to replace invalid white space character with space. 

Example input:  01,022xxxx20,Devendra,xasdas

Very last character "" is invalid white space character. 

 

 

<p>Example input: 01,022xxxx20,Devendra,asdasdfa</p>

 

 

Very last character "" is invalid white space character.

entry.title: HTML to PDF in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Would it be possible to convert HTML to PDF in SAP CPI?

Regards,

Naresh

entry.title: Removing NULL from SAP CPI mapping - context
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please suggest how can I remove the NULL from the context ? tried couple of script but none working.
